input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.4.2
            TITLE: quasi-isotropic layup

            CONTENT:
            rule F.4.2: Quasi-Isotropic Layup
F.4.2 Quasi-Isotropic Layup 
A layup with equal fiber strength and stiffness along any orientation in the plane of the layup.  
a. When a layup has equal fiber properties and mass in the 0/90/+45/-45 directions, the 
layup may be considered Quasi-Isotropic

final_answer: rule F.4.2: Quasi-Isotropic Layup F.4.2 Quasi-Isotropic Layup A layup with equal fiber strength and stiffness along any orientation in the plane of the layup. a. When a layup has equal fiber properties and mass in the 0/90/+45/-45 directions, the layup may be considered Quasi-Isotropic
